LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO B&P CODE SECTION 17200 CAUSE OF ACTION, NO OPPOSITION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE TENDER OF AMOUNT OWED TO MAINTAIN ANY CAUSE OF ACTION FOR IRREGULARITY IN THE SALE PROCEDURE. (SEE ABDALLAH VS. UNITED SAVINGS BANK (1996) 43 CAL.APP. 4TH 1101, 1109.) BREACH OF IMPLIED CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS, MORTGAGE CAN BE CREATED, RENEWED, OR EXTENDED ONLY BY WRITING (CC SECTION 2922.) NO IMPLIED CONTRACT POSSIBLE WHERE A WRITTEN CONTRACT EXISTS. SEE VARNI BROS. CORP. VS. WINE WORLD, INC. (1995) 35 CAL.APP. 4TH 880, 888-889.) THE DEED OF TRUST GOVERNS THE PARTIES RELATIONSHIPS. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS WITH SPECIFICITY TO SUPPORT THE INTENTIONAL TORT/FRAUD AND FORECLOSURE PREVENTION ACT CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF ALSO TO PLEAD TIMELINESS OF RELIEF SOUGHT UNDER CC SECTION 2923.52. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to B&P Code section 17200 cause of action, no opposition. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to remaining causes of action. Plaintiff must allege tender of amount owed to maintain any cause of action for irregularity in the sale procedure. (See Abdallah vs. United Savings Bank (1996) 43 Cal.App. 4th 1101, 1109.) Breach of implied contract cause of action fails, mortgage can be created, renewed, or extended only by writing (CC section 2922.) No implied contract possible where a written contract exists. See Varni Bros. Corp. vs. Wine World, Inc. (1995) 35 Cal.App. 4th 880, 888-889.) The deed of trust governs the parties relationships. Plaintiff must plead facts with specificity to support the intentional tort/fraud and Foreclosure Prevention Act causes of action. Plaintiff also to plead timeliness of relief sought under CC section 2923.52. (Moving party to prepare Order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
